summary: The 'nuniesmith/futures' backlog centers on finalizing model validation, NT8 safety enhancements, web UI polish for trading/review modes, trainer/settings UI separation, and integrating Kraken data into training/cross-asset signals. 20 active items grouped into 5 batches ordered by risk reduction (validations/safety first), then usability (UI), integration (NT8/web), UI expansion, and data pipeline enhancements. Deferred items await funded account or are ongoing.

batches.title: model-nt8-validation-safety
batches.rationale: Highest impact/risk: blocks live TPT trading. Validates model parity, NT8 deployment, and adds critical 4PM hard flatten to prevent account termination. Dependencies minimal (uses existing models/scripts).
items: Validate ONNX ↔ PyTorch parity — run same 18-feature v6 tabular batch through .pt and .onnx inference; assert max absolute difference < 1e-4
Verify sync_models.sh pulls new .pt + .onnx + feature_contract.json from nuniesmith/futures and restarts engine container cleanly

Test v6 ONNX auto-adapt — deploy BreakoutStrategy.cs to NT8, compile, verify: Startup log shows CNN tabular dim: model expects 18, C# builds 18; Per-type TP3 mults loaded from feature_contract.json (log each type's mult at startup); Entry logs show [positions: N/5]; No OCO ID cannot be reused or signal name longer than 50 errors; Run for a full session and review output logs
Parity-test Phase 3 EMA9 trailing — run Python engine + C# strategy side-by-side on same OHLCV data, compare Phase 3 trail stop levels and exit prices. Target: ≤ 1 tick divergence per bar.
4:00 PM ET hard flatten — add a time-based safety check in OnBarUpdate() (BIP0 path) that calls FlattenAll("TPT_HARD_STOP_16:00") if current ET time ≥ 16:00 and any positions are open
implementation_steps: Run parity script on models/breakout_cnn_best.pt and .onnx; fix if diffs >1e-4.
Execute sync_models.sh on Pi; verify files pulled/restarted via docker logs.
Run deploy_nt8.bat; load strategy in NT8; check startup logs, run sim session.
Extend test_phase3_ema9_parity.py for live data parity if needed; run side-by-side.
Implement TPT hard flatten in BreakoutStrategy.cs OnBarUpdate; add RiskBlocked logic; deploy/test.
acceptance_criteria: ONNX/PyTorch max diff <1e-4 on validation batch.
sync_models.sh pulls files, restarts engine without errors.
NT8 logs confirm 18 features, TP3 mults, no errors in full session.
NT8 flattens all at 16:00 ET in TPT mode, blocks risk until 18:00.

batches.title: web-ui-trading-review-mode
batches.rationale: High impact for trader UX during live sessions; low risk, builds on existing dashboard. Follows validation to enable safe trading UI.
items: Add UI mode toggle — "Trading" vs "Review" mode switch in the dashboard header
Remove "Next Session" panel — it's static schedule info that doesn't change; remove from _render_full_dashboard() in dashboard.py
Grok AI → manual pull only — change Grok panel from auto-refresh (hx-trigger="every 60s") to a manual button ("Ask Grok") that fetches on click
Fix forex futures spread on asset cards — 6E and other forex pairs show identical entry/stop/TP values when ATR is very small relative to price
Estimated dollar value on asset cards — add $risk and $reward estimates next to stop/TP levels
implementation_steps: Add toggle button/JS localStorage in dashboard.html.py; CSS classes for .mode-trading/.mode-review.
Update Grok panel hx-trigger to 'click' on button.
In compute_asset_focus(), use tick_size-aware rounding (e.g. 5 decimals for 6E); update template.
Compute $risk/$target1 in compute_asset_focus(); add to Levels grid template.
acceptance_criteria: Toggle switches panels correctly; persists in localStorage; auto-detects mode by time.
Grok fetches only on button click.
6E asset cards show distinct entry/stop/TP with 5 decimals.

batches.title: nt8-bridge-trading-tests
batches.rationale: Ensures NT8/web integration for live control; medium risk post-validation/UI. Tests coexistence of manual/auto trades.
items: Bridge /flatten from web UI — ensure the Flatten All button in the dashboard triggers Bridge FlattenAll which closes every position across all instruments immediately (already wired, needs live test)

Manual trade from dashboard — when the strategy is always running and I place a manual entry from the web UI via /execute_signal, it should coexist with automated entries. Verify: Manual entry gets its own PositionPhase tracking; Automated entries continue alongside manual positions; Both respect MaxConcurrentPositions = 5
implementation_steps: Deploy NT8+Bridge; trigger Flatten from dashboard; verify all positions closed.
Run NT8 live; manual entry via dashboard during auto signals; check position counts/phases.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard Flatten closes all NT8 positions instantly.
Manual + auto entries coexist up to 5 total; each tracks own phase.

batches.title: trainer-settings-ui
batches.rationale: Improves ops/monitoring UX; low risk, separates concerns. Depends on core UI stable.
items: Extract trainer UI into its own page — currently the trainer server has its own HTML UI at /trainer/ that's proxied through web service. Instead: Create a dedicated /train page in the web service dashboard; ...
Settings page — new /settings page in the web dashboard
implementation_steps: Add /train route in web FastAPI; proxy /api/trainer/* to trainer; build HTML with status/start buttons.
Add /settings route; forms for URLs/toggles/env; fetch Tailscale IPs, API statuses.
acceptance_criteria: /settings configures services, shows statuses, saves to Redis.

batches.title: kraken-data-training-integration
batches.rationale: Expands data sources for better models/signals; higher effort/risk due to APIs. Last as it enhances post-core.
items: Kraken API key/secret via CI/CD — ensure KRAKEN_API_KEY and KRAKEN_API_SECRET are injected as secrets...
Kraken data in training pipeline — when training is triggered from the web UI, the dataset generator should automatically...
Unified data resolver for training — create a DataResolver class in the data service that...
Cross-asset breakout signals — use Kraken crypto data alongside Massive futures data...
Generalize model across asset classes — the CNN is already trained on 22 symbols... Extend to include direct Kraken crypto pairs in training...
implementation_steps: Add GH secrets; update CI/CD/.env for Kraken keys.
Wire DataResolver into dataset_generator; test cache/API fallback.
Implement DataResolver class; integrate into training/engine.
Add crypto momentum feature; correlation-based signals.
Update dataset_generator for Kraken; retrain v7.
acceptance_criteria: Kraken keys deploy without leaks; data fetches.
Training pulls Kraken via resolver; generates crypto datasets.
v7 model trains on crypto; feature_contract updated.

deferred: Simple trade copier for multiple TPT accounts — once the first $50k account is funded...
Per-type/session win-rate Prometheus metrics and Grafana panels
Per-type backtest validation in NT8 Strategy Analyzer
risks: Model parity failure blocks NT8 deployment.
TPT rule violation (e.g. overnight holds) terminates account.
Training data gaps degrade model quality.
gameplan_markdown:
# GAMEPLAN.md

## Summary
The 'nuniesmith/futures' backlog centers on finalizing model validation, NT8 safety enhancements, web UI polish for trading/review modes, trainer/settings UI separation, and integrating Kraken data into training/cross-asset signals. 20 active items grouped into 5 batches ordered by risk reduction (validations/safety first), then usability (UI), integration (NT8/web), UI expansion, and data pipeline enhancements.

## Batches

### Batch 1: model-nt8-validation-safety (Critical, 1-2 days)
**Rationale**: Highest impact/risk: blocks live TPT trading.
**Items**:
- Validate ONNX ↔ PyTorch parity...
- Verify `sync_models.sh`...
- Test v6 ONNX auto-adapt...
- Parity-test Phase 3 EMA9 trailing...
- 4:00 PM ET hard flatten...
**Steps**:
1. Run parity script...
**Acceptance**:
- ONNX/PyTorch max diff <1e-4...

### Batch 2: web-ui-trading-review-mode (High, 1 day)
**Rationale**: High impact for trader UX...
**Items**:
- Add UI mode toggle...
(and so on for all items)
**Steps**:
1. Add toggle button...
**Acceptance**:
- Toggle switches panels...

### Batch 3: nt8-bridge-trading-tests (High, 0.5-1 day)
...

### Batch 4: trainer-settings-ui (Medium, 1-2 days)
...

### Batch 5: kraken-data-training-integration (Medium, 2-3 days)
...

## Deferred
- Simple trade copier...
(and list)

## Risks
- Model parity failure...
(and list)

## Next Review: After Batch 1
